title: An Integrated Modeling Approach for Managing the Water–Energy–Food Nexus in Resource-Based Cities: A Case Study of Daqing, China
description: SpeakForWater Episode 7: An Integrated Modeling Approach for Managing the Water–Energy–Food Nexus in Resource-Based Cities: A Case Study of Daqing, China. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
